title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. labillardierei
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. labillardierei, also known as Hieracium, is a plant species from the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Australia. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Hieracium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
